verses.text: Tua khit ciangin leitung kiu li-ah vantung mi li, kiu khatah khat ciat dingin leitung, tuipi tung, leh singkung khat peuhpeuh a mutkhak lohna dingin leitung huih lite lencipin a om uh ka mu hi

Tua ciangin a nungta Pasian' ciamtehna a tawi vantung mi khat, nisuahna lam panin hong paito ka mu hi. Leitung leh tuipi suksiat theihna ding vangliatna a kipia vantung mi lite kiangah amah in nakpi takin gen a
“I Pasian' nasemte, a taltang uhah ciamtehna i bawl khit matengin leitung, tuipi, leh singkungte susia nai kei in,” a ci hi
Israel mite sung panin a nam namin Pasian' ciamtehna tawh a taltang uhah a kiciamteh mi a vekpi-in 144 pha hi, ci-in hong kigen hi

Tuate pen Israel minam sawmlenih sungah nam khatah then khat tul nih ciat hi a, tua minamte pen Judah minam, Reuben minam, Gad minam, Asher minam, Naftali minam, Manasseh minam, Simeon minam, Levi minam, Issakhar minam, Zebulun minam, Josef minam, leh Benjamin minam ahi uh hi.

Tua khit ciangin ka khuadak leh mi namkim, pau namkim panin kuama sim zawhloh dingin a tam mahmah mihonpite, tokhom mai leh Tuuno mai-ah ding uh a, puanpak silhin a khut uhah nisuh hiang a tawi uh ka mu hi
Amaute nakpi takin awngin, “Tokhom tungah a tu i Pasian leh Tuuno pen eite a hong honkhia ahi uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tokhom, upate, leh ganhing lite kimkotah vantung mi khempeuh dingin tokhom mai ngatin kunin Pasian bia uh a
“Amen! Eite' Pasian in phatna, minthan'na, pilna, lungdam kohna, pahtawina, vangliatna, leh hatna a tawntungin nei ta hen! Amen,” a ci uh hi
Tua laitakin upate khat in keima kiangah, “Hih puanpak a silh mite kuate hi a, koi lai panin hong pai ahi uh hiam?” ci-in hong dot ciangin

“Ka thei kei hi, topa aw. Nangmah in na theizaw ding hi,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in keima kiangah, “Hih mite pen bawlsiatna lianpi thuakin a hong suakta mite ahi uh hi. Amaute in a puan uh sawpsiangin Tuuno sisan tawh a paksak uh ahi hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian' tokhom mai-ah amaute ding uh a, sun leh zanin a biakinn sungah ama na sem uh hi. Tokhom tungah a tupa in amaute ompihin a hu ding hi
Amaute gilkial cih om nawnlo ding a, a dang uh zong taak nawnlo ding hi. Nisa zong thuakkha nawnlo ding uh a, a sa in zong kangkha nawnlo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Tokhom laizangah a om Tuuno, amaute a kempa hi ding a, nuntakna tui omna-ah amaute paipih ding a, Pasian in a khitui khempeuh uh nulsak ding hi,” hong ci hi.
